title: Refused boarding (air)
header: I am writing to complain that I was refused boarding by {{operator}} on {{date}} at {{location}}.
legalParagraph: Under EU Regulation 1107/2006 (as retained in UK law), an air carrier or its agent may not refuse to carry a person with reduced mobility on the grounds of disability. The Civil Aviation Authority oversees compliance and may take enforcement action. The Equality Act 2010 also applies.
ask: I would like a full investigation, a written response within 20 working days, a full refund and reasonable rebooking, and confirmation of the corrective action taken with the staff and gate agents involved.
